logic_description: must have visit with eye specialty provider and one of a more specific set of eye visit markers derived from Cindy's DR network study (total 1463 concepts)

must have visit with eye specialty provider and require 180 days prior observation; select earliest qualifying eye screening event (w/ eye specialty provider); age ≥40; end at end of continuous observation

must have visit with eye specialty provider and require 180 days prior observation; select latest qualifying eye screening event (w/ eye specialty provider); age ≥40; end at end of continuous observation
must have one of a more specific set of eye visit markers derived from Cindy's DR network study
similar to id 200 with 180 days prior observation and age requirement
must have one of the eye visit markers and require 180 days prior observation; select earliest qualifying eye screening event; age ≥40; end at end of continuous observation
must have one of the eye visit markers and require 180 days prior observation; select latest qualifying eye screening event; age ≥40; end at end of continuous observation
must have one of a broader set of eye visit markers which includes all eye findings (10785 concepts)
must have visit with eye specialty provider and one of the broader set of eye visit markers which includes all eye findings
one visit with glaucoma condition for entry
two separate days of visits with glaucoma condition (one for entry and another at least 1 day later for inclusion)
one occurrence of glaucoma condition medication or slt/surgery for entry
two separate days of glaucoma condition medication or slt/surgery (one for entry and another at least 1 day later for inclusion)
glaucoma condition or slt/surgery, plus at least 1 day later glaucoma condition, slt/surgery, or med. (removes meds from initial inclusion)
glaucoma or glaucoma suspect condition or slt/surgery, plus at least 1 day later glaucoma condition, slt/surgery, or med
